content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed branch vs fork point ca4d234. Part A adds tracked-gitignored and assume-unchanged path removal in build_checkpoint_tree via two ls-files queries (one against temp index with -i -c --exclude-standard, one against real index with -v to catch assume-unchanged bits not carried by read-tree), deduplicated in a BTreeSet, removed via update-index --force-remove. Part B untracks result with git rm --cached. Two tests cover both cases in tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs. The -v output parser correctly filters the lowercase-letter-then-space tag format. git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard on HEAD returns empty, confirming the acceptance criterion. The top-level prompt-t7j.md follows an existing repo pattern (18 similar prompt-*.md files from prior PRs) and is not a stray. No correctness, safety, or maintainability issues found.

## Amendments

None.
